ew_context: Double top suggests wave B completion at 1.6069 high - wave C decline targeting lower levels
pattern_desc: Double top pattern with peaks at 1.6069 and 1.3959. Breakdown below neckline confirms bearish reversal structure.
invalidation: Reclaim above 1.3959 negates the double top pattern
